description: Style Note Embrace the dip in temperatures with this trendy sweatshirt from adidas. The patented 3-Stripes enhance your sporty look while the soft material gives you absolute comfort. Wear it by itself, or over a tee, and pair it with shorts and canvas shoes for that perfect Sports-casual look. Product Details Black sweatshirt, has a round ribbed neckline, print on the chest, long sleeves with Adidas patented three stripes, embroidered Adidas branding below the neckline at the back and a ribbed cuff for a snug Fit Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash warm Do not bleach or tumble dry Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and waist 32”) is wearing a size M
